title: Orchestration State v5
description: Canonical schema for the orchestration system's v5 state format.

$schema.title: Schema Version
$schema.description: Schema version identifier. Must be orchestration-state-v5.

name.title: Project Name
name.description: Unique project identifier derived from the project directory name.

created.title: Created Timestamp
created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the project was initialized.

updated.title: Updated Timestamp
updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last state mutation.

config.title: Project Configuration
config.description: Static configuration values set at project initialization.

gate_mode.title: Gate Mode
gate_mode.description: Default human gate frequency. Values: ask, task, phase, autonomous.

limits.title: Execution Limits
limits.description: Safeguard limits for the execution pipeline.

max_phases.title: Max Phases
max_phases.description: Maximum number of phases allowed per pipeline run.

max_tasks_per_phase.title: Max Tasks Per Phase
max_tasks_per_phase.description: Maximum number of tasks allowed in a single phase.

max_retries_per_task.title: Max Retries Per Task
max_retries_per_task.description: Maximum number of retry attempts per task.

max_consecutive_review_rejections.title: Max Consecutive Review Rejections
max_consecutive_review_rejections.description: Maximum number of consecutive review rejections before the pipeline halts.

source_control.title: Source Control Configuration
source_control.description: Default source control settings for the project.

auto_commit.title: Auto Commit Mode
auto_commit.description: Controls when commits are made automatically. Values: ask, always, never.

auto_pr.title: Auto PR Mode
auto_pr.description: Controls when pull requests are created automatically. Values: ask, always, never.

pipeline.title: Pipeline Section
pipeline.description: Current pipeline execution state including tier, source control, and halt information.

graph.title: Graph State
graph.description: DAG execution state including the template, current position, and all node states.

NodeStatus.title: Node Status
NodeStatus.description: Execution status of a node. Values: not_started, in_progress, completed, failed, halted, skipped.

GraphStatus.title: Graph Status
GraphStatus.description: Execution status of the graph. Values: not_started, in_progress, completed, halted.

NodesRecord.title: Nodes Record
NodesRecord.description: A map of node IDs to their NodeState. Keys are string node identifiers.

additionalProperties.title: Node State Entry
additionalProperties.description: The state of a single node, discriminated by the kind field.

NodeState.title: Node State
NodeState.description: Discriminated union of all possible node state variants, discriminated by the kind field.

StepNodeState.title: Step Node State
StepNodeState.description: State for a step node that executes an action and tracks its document output.

kind.title: Node Kind
kind.description: Discriminant for the step node variant. Must be 'step'.

status.title: Node Status
status.description: Current execution status of this node.

doc_path.title: Document Path
doc_path.description: Path to the output document produced by this step, or null if not yet created.

retries.title: Retry Count
retries.description: Number of retry attempts taken for this step.

verdict.title: Verdict
verdict.description: Review verdict for this step, or null if not yet reviewed.

last_parse_error.title: Last Parse Error
last_parse_error.description: Structured error info from the most recent failed Master Plan parse attempt by the explosion script. Populated on explosion_failed, cleared on explosion_completed. Used by the planner's recovery branch to self-correct.

parse_retry_count.title: Parse Retry Count
parse_retry_count.description: Number of times the explosion script's parser has rejected the planner's Master Plan output for this node. Reset to 0 on explosion_completed. Hardcoded cap of 3 enforced in the explosion_failed mutation handler.

GateNodeState.title: Gate Node State
GateNodeState.description: State for a gate node that pauses pipeline execution for human approval.

kind.title: Node Kind
kind.description: Discriminant for the gate node variant. Must be 'gate'.

status.title: Node Status
status.description: Current execution status of this node.

gate_active.title: Gate Active
gate_active.description: When true, the gate is currently blocking pipeline execution awaiting human approval.

ConditionalNodeState.title: Conditional Node State
ConditionalNodeState.description: State for a conditional node that routes execution based on an evaluated condition.

kind.title: Node Kind
kind.description: Discriminant for the conditional node variant. Must be 'conditional'.

status.title: Node Status
status.description: Current execution status of this node.

branch_taken.title: Branch Taken
branch_taken.description: Which branch was selected after condition evaluation: 'true', 'false', or null if not yet evaluated.

ParallelNodeState.title: Parallel Node State
ParallelNodeState.description: State for a parallel node that executes multiple child nodes concurrently or serially.

kind.title: Node Kind
kind.description: Discriminant for the parallel node variant. Must be 'parallel'.

status.title: Node Status
status.description: Current execution status of this node.

nodes.title: Child Nodes
nodes.description: Map of child node IDs to their execution state.

ForEachPhaseNodeState.title: For-Each-Phase Node State
ForEachPhaseNodeState.description: State for a for_each_phase node that iterates over all phases defined in the master plan.

kind.title: Node Kind
kind.description: Discriminant for the for_each_phase node variant. Must be 'for_each_phase'.

status.title: Node Status
status.description: Current execution status of this node.

iterations.title: Phase Iterations
iterations.description: Ordered list of phase iteration entries, one per phase in the master plan.

items.title: Phase Iteration Entry
items.description: State for a single phase iteration.

ForEachTaskNodeState.title: For-Each-Task Node State
ForEachTaskNodeState.description: State for a for_each_task node that iterates over all tasks in the current phase.

kind.title: Node Kind
kind.description: Discriminant for the for_each_task node variant. Must be 'for_each_task'.

status.title: Node Status
status.description: Current execution status of this node.

iterations.title: Task Iterations
iterations.description: Ordered list of task iteration entries, one per task in the current phase.

items.title: Task Iteration Entry
items.description: State for a single task iteration.

IterationEntry.title: Iteration Entry
IterationEntry.description: State for a single phase or task iteration within a for-each node.

status.title: Iteration Status
status.description: Current execution status of this iteration.

nodes.title: Iteration Nodes
nodes.description: Map of node IDs to their execution state for this iteration.

corrective_tasks.title: Corrective Tasks
corrective_tasks.description: Ordered list of corrective task entries injected during this iteration.

items.title: Corrective Task Entry
items.description: State for a single corrective task injected into this iteration.

doc_path.title: Iteration Doc Path
doc_path.description: Relative path to the authoring doc for this iteration (phase plan or task handoff). Optional; absent on iterations that have not yet been authored.

commit_hash.title: Commit Hash
commit_hash.description: Per-task commit hash set by the COMMIT_COMPLETED mutation, or null if no commit has been made for this iteration.

CorrectiveTaskEntry.title: Corrective Task Entry
CorrectiveTaskEntry.description: State for a corrective task injected into the pipeline after a review rejection.

index.title: Corrective Task Index
index.description: 1-based corrective attempt number within this iteration.

reason.title: Injection Reason
reason.description: Human-readable explanation of why this corrective task was injected.

injected_after.title: Injected After
injected_after.description: Node ID of the node that triggered the corrective task injection (e.g., 'code_review').

status.title: Corrective Task Status
status.description: Current execution status of this corrective task.

nodes.title: Corrective Task Nodes
nodes.description: Map of node IDs to their execution state for this corrective task.

doc_path.title: Corrective Task Doc Path
doc_path.description: Relative path to the corrective task handoff doc. Optional; absent on entries that have not yet been authored.

commit_hash.title: Commit Hash
commit_hash.description: Per-corrective-task commit hash set by the COMMIT_COMPLETED mutation, or null if no commit has been made for this corrective task.

SourceControlState.title: Source Control State
SourceControlState.description: Source control configuration and runtime state for the project. Does not include commit_hash (tracked per-iteration instead).

branch.title: Feature Branch
branch.description: Git branch name used for the project's code changes.

base_branch.title: Base Branch
base_branch.description: Git branch to merge into when the pull request is created.

worktree_path.title: Worktree Path
worktree_path.description: Absolute path to the git worktree directory for this project.

auto_commit.title: Auto Commit Mode
auto_commit.description: Controls when commits are made automatically. Values: ask, always, never.

auto_pr.title: Auto PR Mode
auto_pr.description: Controls when pull requests are created automatically. Values: ask, always, never.

remote_url.title: Remote URL
remote_url.description: URL of the remote repository, or null if not configured.

compare_url.title: Compare URL
compare_url.description: URL to compare the feature branch against base branch, or null if not yet available.

pr_url.title: Pull Request URL
pr_url.description: URL of the created pull request, or null if not yet created.

PipelineSection.title: Pipeline Section
PipelineSection.description: Current pipeline execution state including tier, source control configuration, and halt information.

gate_mode.title: Gate Mode Override
gate_mode.description: Human gate frequency override for this project, or null to use config default. Values: task, phase, autonomous.

source_control.title: Source Control State
source_control.description: Source control runtime state for this project, or null if not yet initialized.

current_tier.title: Current Tier
current_tier.description: Active pipeline tier. Values: planning, execution, review, halted.

halt_reason.title: Halt Reason
halt_reason.description: Human-readable reason why the pipeline halted, or null if the pipeline is not halted.

GraphState.title: Graph State
GraphState.description: DAG execution state including the pipeline template, current node position, and all node states.

template_id.title: Template ID
template_id.description: Identifier of the pipeline template being executed.

status.title: Graph Status
status.description: Current execution status of the entire graph.

current_node_path.title: Current Node Path
current_node_path.description: Dot/bracket path to the currently active node for observability (e.g., 'phase_loop[1].task_loop[2].code_review'), or null if no node is active.

nodes.title: Root Nodes
nodes.description: Map of root-level node IDs to their execution state.
